comments.body:
Hello Walid,

Good Day!

As FedEx is sunsetting the account integration using FedEx Web Services API, the account has to be added again using the new FedEx REST API.

The new integration option is already available in our app so that you can add your account and continue using it without any disruption.

Please refer to the following video explaining the process - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1w9yMMSHiZE

Let us know if you face any difficulties in the process. We will be happy to schedule a Zoom call to assist you further.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Walid,
 
Good Day!
 
As FedEx is sunsetting the account integration using FedEx Web Services API, the account has to be added again using the new FedEx REST API.
 
The new integration option is already available in our app so that you can add your account and continue using it without any disruption.
 
Please refer to the following video explaining the process - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1w9yMMSHiZE
 
Let us know if you face any difficulties in the process. We will be happy to schedule a Zoom call to assist you further.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Walid,

Thank you for your response.

We would like to check this case from our end.

For the same,

- You can ignore the collaborator request.
- Please provide me with the below details so we can try connecting the account.
  - Account Name
  - Account Number
  - First Name
  - Last Name
  - Company Name
  - Phone Number
  - E-mail
  - Street
  - Country/Region
  - City
  - Postal Code
- Also, if possible, please share a latest FedEx Invoice which will ensure to have the validation done quickly.

We can also hop on a Zoom call to assist you with the integration. You can use the appointment link provided below to schedule the meeting.
[Schedule an appointment]

Awaiting your response.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Walid,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
We would like to check this case from our end.
 
For the same, 
  • You can ignore the collaborator request.
  • Please provide me with the below details so we can try connecting the account.
    • Account Name
    • Account Number
    • First Name
    • Last Name
    • Company Name
    • Phone Number
    • E-mail
    • Street
    • Country/Region
    • City
    • Postal Code
  • Also, if possible, please share a latest FedEx Invoice which will ensure to have the validation done quickly.
 
We can also hop on a Zoom call to assist you with the integration. You can use the appointment link provided below to schedule the meeting.
[Schedule an appointment]
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Regards,
 
Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
